#+TITLE: Source Blocks Theme Matrix
#+LATEX_CLASS: veriff
#+LATEX_VARIANT: refresh-overdrive
#+EXPORT_EYEBROW: Theme Matrix
#+EXPORT_CODE_THEME: light

* Light Theme (No Line Numbers)

#+BEGIN_SRC python
def hello_light():
    print("Hello from light theme!")
#+END_SRC

* Light Theme (With Line Numbers)

#+BEGIN_SRC python -n
def hello_light_numbered():
    print("Hello from light theme with numbers!")
#+END_SRC

* Dark Theme (No Line Numbers)

#+LATEX: \HubCodeThemeDark

#+BEGIN_SRC python
def hello_dark():
    print("Hello from dark theme!")
#+END_SRC

* Dark Theme (With Line Numbers)

#+BEGIN_SRC python -n
def hello_dark_numbered():
    print("Hello from dark theme with numbers!")
#+END_SRC
